remarks: Welcome to Regency Towers, where comfort, convenience, and spacious living come together in the heart of Stamford's sought-after Strawberry Hill neighborhood. Although designated as Unit 1H, this sun-filled corner residence is located on the second floor and offers an impressive 1,646 square feet of beautifully maintained living space.  This rare 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home featuring an open-concept layout. Large windows throughout flood the home with natural light. The spacious living and dining areas flow seamlessly into the fully updated kitchen. The generous primary suite with a beautifully updated ensuite bath, while two additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family, guests, or a home office. A stylish powder room and updated 2 full bath. Recent improvements include refinished hardwood floors, fresh interior paint, and the replacement of two bedroom HVAC units in February 2026.  Residents enjoy an exceptional lifestyle with a 24/7 doorman, on-site superintendent, updated security system, laundry facilities on every floor, visitor parking, and assigned indoor garage parking space #77, conveniently located near the elevator. HOA include heat, hot water, and cooking gas. Ideally situated directly across from Tully Health & Fitness Center and just minutes from downtown Stamford's shopping, restaurants, entertainment, parks, transportation, and beaches, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of space, value, and location.  Welcome home to Regency Towers
